EN_2: Chess board — black and white squares!
ES_2: ¡Tablero de ajedrez — casillas negras y blancas!
EN_3: Penny loves to play on the chess board!
ES_3: ¡A Penny le encanta jugar en el tablero de ajedrez!

EN_1: The pawn is the smallest piece!
ES_1: ¡El peón es la pieza más pequeña!
EN_2: Pawns move forward — never backward!
EN_3: Penny loves the little pawn!
ES_3: ¡A Penny le encanta el pequeño peón!

EN_1: Knight! It jumps in an L shape!
EN_2: The knight can jump over other pieces!
ES_2: ¡El caballo puede saltar sobre otras piezas!
EN_3: Knights are angry — careful!

EN_2: The queen can move anywhere!
ES_2: ¡La reina puede moverse a cualquier lugar!
EN_3: Penny wants to be the queen!

EN_2: The king is the most important piece!
ES_2: ¡El rey es la pieza más importante!
EN_3: Penny says — protect the king!

EN_1: Rook! It moves left and right and up and down!
ES_1: ¡Torre! ¡Se mueve a la izquierda y derecha y arriba y abajo!
EN_2: The rook is shaped like a tower!
EN_3: This penguin loves the rook!
ES_3: ¡A este pingüino le encanta la torre!

EN_1: Bishop! It moves in a diagonal line!
EN_2: The bishop always stays on one color!
ES_2: ¡El alfil siempre se queda en un solo color!
EN_3: Penny's favorite piece is the bishop!
ES_3: ¡La pieza favorita de Penny es el alfil!

EN_1: Square! Every chess board has 64 of them!
EN_2: Each piece stands on one square!
EN_3: Penny's chess square is black!

EN_1: Row! It goes left and right!
EN_2: A chess board has 8 rows!
EN_3: Penny counts every row on the board!

EN_1: Column! It goes up and down!
EN_2: A chess board has 8 columns!
EN_3: Count the columns with Penny — eight!

EN_1: Living room — where the family is!
EN_2: Sit and watch TV in the living room!
ES_2: ¡Siéntate a ver televisión en la sala!
EN_3: Penny wants to sit on your sofa!

EN_1: Kitchen! This is where we cook food!
EN_2: The kitchen smells so good!
EN_3: Penny loves to eat in the kitchen!
ES_3: ¡A Penny le encanta comer en la cocina!

EN_2: Brush your teeth in the bathroom!
EN_3: Even penguins wash their hands!
ES_3: ¡Hasta los pingüinos se lavan las manos!

EN_2: The bedroom is where you rest!
EN_3: Penny sleeps in a cold bedroom!

EN_1: Dining room — where the family eats!
EN_2: Sit at the table in the dining room!
EN_3: Penny wants to eat at your table!

EN_2: Wash your clothes in the laundry room!
EN_3: Penny has no clothes to wash!

EN_1: Garden! Where flowers and plants grow!
EN_2: Plants need sun and water to grow!
ES_2: ¡Las plantas necesitan sol y agua para crecer!
EN_3: Penny likes to walk in the garden!
ES_3: ¡A Penny le gusta caminar en el jardín!

EN_2: The car is in the garage!
EN_3: Penny does not have a car or a garage!

EN_2: Toys and games are in the playroom!
ES_2: ¡Los juguetes y juegos están en el cuarto de juegos!
EN_3: Penny wants to play in your playroom!
ES_3: ¡Penny quiere jugar en tu cuarto de juegos!

EN_2: Computers are in the office!
EN_3: Penny has an office in Antarctica!
ES_3: ¡Penny tiene una oficina en la Antártida!

EN_1: Hair! On top of your head!
EN_2: Your hair can be long or short!
ES_2: ¡Tu cabello puede ser largo o corto!
EN_3: Penguins have no hair — only feathers!

EN_1: Head! Your brain is in there!
EN_2: Nod your head yes!
EN_3: Penny has a big round head!
ES_3: ¡Penny tiene una cabeza grande y redonda!

EN_1: Face! Let me see your smile!
EN_2: Your face has eyes and nose and mouth!
ES_2: ¡Tu cara tiene ojos y nariz y boca!
EN_3: Penny has a cute black and white face!
ES_3: ¡Penny tiene una cara bonita en blanco y negro!

EN_2: Touch your forehead!
EN_3: A big kiss on your forehead!

EN_2: Your eyebrows are above your eyes!
ES_2: ¡Tus cejas están encima de tus ojos!
EN_3: Penny raises one eyebrow when she is happy!
ES_3: ¡Penny levanta una ceja cuando está feliz!

EN_2: Your eyelashes are long and beautiful!
EN_3: Penny has big beautiful eyelashes!

EN_2: You have two eyes — left and right!
EN_3: Penny has big round eyes!

EN_2: You have two ears!
EN_3: Penguins have very good ears!

EN_2: Your nose is in the middle of your face!
ES_2: ¡Tu nariz está en el centro de tu cara!
EN_3: Penny has a yellow nose — like a beak!
ES_3: ¡Penny tiene una nariz amarilla — como un pico!

EN_2: You have two cheeks — left and right!
EN_3: Penny has pink cheeks!

EN_2: Open your mouth big!
EN_3: Penny opens her mouth to eat fish!
ES_3: ¡Penny abre la boca para comer pescado!

EN_2: Your lips help you talk and eat!
ES_2: ¡Tus labios te ayudan a hablar y comer!
EN_3: Penny has orange lips!

EN_2: Brush your teeth two times a day!
ES_2: ¡Cepíllate los dientes dos veces al día!
EN_3: Penny says — brush your teeth!

EN_2: Your tongue helps you taste food!
ES_2: ¡Tu lengua te ayuda a saborear la comida!
EN_3: Penny uses her tongue to eat fish!
ES_3: ¡Penny usa su lengua para comer pescado!

EN_1: Chin! At the bottom of your face!
ES_1: ¡Mentón! ¡En la parte baja de tu cara!
EN_2: Touch your chin!
EN_3: Penny has a white chin!

EN_1: Neck! It holds your head up!
EN_2: Turn your neck left and right!
ES_2: ¡Gira el cuello a la izquierda y a la derecha!
EN_3: Penny has a short neck!

EN_2: You have two shoulders!
EN_3: Penny carries fish on her shoulder!

EN_2: Put your hand on your chest!
EN_3: Penny has a big white chest!
ES_3: ¡Penny tiene un pecho grande y blanco!

EN_1: Arm! Move it up and down!
EN_2: Wave your arm — hello!
EN_3: Penny's arms are her wings!
ES_3: ¡Los brazos de Penny son sus alas!

EN_2: Touch your elbow!
EN_3: Penny bends her elbow to swim fast!
ES_3: ¡Penny dobla el codo para nadar rápido!

EN_2: Pat your stomach!
EN_3: Penny's stomach is always hungry for fish!
ES_3: ¡El estómago de Penny siempre tiene hambre de pescado!

EN_2: The wrist connects your hand and arm!
ES_2: ¡La muñeca conecta la mano y el brazo!
EN_3: Penny's wrist helps her swim!
ES_3: ¡La muñeca de Penny la ayuda a nadar!

EN_1: Hand! Give me a high five!
EN_2: You have two hands — left and right!
EN_3: Penny has wings instead of hands!
ES_3: ¡Penny tiene alas en vez de manos!

EN_2: The thumb is the big finger!
EN_3: Give Penny a thumbs up!

EN_1: Finger! How many do you have?
EN_2: You have ten fingers — count them!
EN_3: Penny has no fingers — only wings!

EN_2: Stand on one leg — can you?
EN_3: Penny has short legs but swims fast!
ES_3: ¡Penny tiene piernas cortas pero nada rápido!

EN_2: The knee is in the middle of your leg!
ES_2: ¡La rodilla está en el medio de la pierna!
EN_3: Penny bends her knee to sit down!

EN_2: You have two feet — left and right!
EN_3: Penny has big orange feet!

EN_2: You have five toes on each foot!
EN_3: Penny has orange toes!

EN_2: Your back holds you up all day!
ES_2: ¡Tu espalda te sostiene todo el día!
EN_3: Penny has a black back!

EN_2: Everyone has a butt!
EN_3: Penny sits on her butt on the ice!
ES_3: ¡Penny se sienta en su trasero sobre el hielo!

EN_2: Pizza is red and yellow and delicious!
ES_2: ¡La pizza es roja y amarilla y deliciosa!
EN_3: Penny wants pizza right now!

EN_2: Big and delicious hamburger!
EN_3: Penny loves hamburgers!

EN_2: French fries are made from potatoes!
ES_2: ¡Las papas fritas se hacen con papas!
EN_3: Penny eats french fries with ketchup!

EN_2: Crispy fried chicken — so good!
EN_3: This penguin loves fried chicken!
ES_3: ¡A este pingüino le encanta el pollo frito!

EN_2: Soda has bubbles!
EN_3: Penny's favorite soda is orange!
ES_3: ¡El refresco favorito de Penny es de naranja!

EN_2: Crunch crunch — potato chips!
EN_3: Penny loves potato chips!

EN_1: Candy! Red and yellow and green!
EN_2: Candy is very sweet!
EN_3: Penny's favorite candy is red!
ES_3: ¡El dulce favorito de Penny es rojo!

EN_2: Pink and yellow cupcakes!
EN_3: Penny baked cupcakes for you!

ES_1: ¡Helado! ¡A los pingüinos les encanta la vainilla!
EN_2: Cold and sweet ice cream!
EN_3: What color is your ice cream?

EN_1: This penguin does not like milkshakes!
ES_1: ¡A este pingüino no le gustan los batidos!
EN_2: Milkshake! Cold and sweet!
EN_3: Do you like chocolate milkshake?

EN_2: A hot dog inside a bun!
ES_2: ¡Un hot dog dentro de un pan!
EN_3: Penny loves hot dogs!
ES_3: ¡A Penny le encantan los hot dogs!

EN_2: Dark chocolate or milk chocolate?
EN_3: Penny's favorite food is chocolate!
ES_3: ¡La comida favorita de Penny es el chocolate!

EN_2: Pink donut with rainbow sprinkles!
EN_3: Penny eats a donut every morning!

EN_2: Pop pop pop — popcorn!
EN_3: Penny eats popcorn at the movies!

EN_2: Pink cake with candles!
EN_3: Penny made you a birthday cake!
ES_3: ¡Penny te hizo un pastel de cumpleaños!

EN_2: Nuggets are small pieces of chicken!
ES_2: ¡Los nuggets son pequeños trozos de pollo!
EN_3: Penny dips nuggets in ketchup!

EN_2: Pancakes with honey and butter!
EN_3: Penny eats ten pancakes for breakfast!
ES_3: ¡Penny come diez panqueques en el desayuno!

EN_2: Soft and sweet cotton candy!
EN_3: Penny loves pink cotton candy!
ES_3: ¡A Penny le encanta el algodón de azúcar rosado!

EN_2: Gum — do not swallow it!
EN_3: Penny chews gum all day!

EN_2: Red and orange and green lollipops!
EN_3: Penny's favorite lollipop is red!
ES_3: ¡La paleta favorita de Penny es roja!

EN_1: Gummy bears! Red and green and yellow!
ES_1: ¡Ositos de goma! ¡Rojos y verdes y amarillos!
EN_2: Soft and sweet gummy bears!
EN_3: Penny eats gummy bears every day!
ES_3: ¡Penny come ositos de goma todos los días!

EN_2: Marshmallows are sweet and soft!
EN_3: Penny loves white marshmallows — like snow!
ES_3: ¡A Penny le encantan los malvaviscos blancos — ¡como la nieve!

EN_2: Red and orange and green popsicles!
ES_2: ¡Paletas de hielo rojas y anaranjadas y verdes!
EN_3: Penny loves cold popsicles!
ES_3: ¡A Penny le encantan las paletas de hielo frías!

EN_2: Chocolate brownies — so good!
EN_3: Penny made chocolate brownies!

EN_2: Golden onion rings!
EN_3: Penny eats onion rings on Fridays!
ES_3: ¡Penny come aros de cebolla los viernes!

EN_1: Corn dog! Meat on a stick!
EN_2: Yellow corn dog — so delicious!
EN_3: Penny loves corn dogs at the park!
ES_3: ¡A Penny le encantan los perros en maíz en el parque!

EN_2: Big chocolate chip cookies!
EN_3: Penny baked cookies for you!

EN_2: Salty pretzels — so good!
EN_3: Penny eats pretzels every day!

EN_2: Put sweet syrup on your pancakes!
EN_3: Penny puts syrup on everything!

EN_2: Put whipped cream on top!
EN_3: Penny puts whipped cream on her fish!
ES_3: ¡Penny le pone crema batida a su pescado!

EN_1: Apple! Red or green or yellow!
EN_2: One apple a day is good for you!
ES_2: ¡Una manzana al día es buena para ti!
EN_3: Penny gives you a red apple!

EN_2: Peel the banana and eat it!
EN_3: Penny loves yellow bananas!
ES_3: ¡A Penny le encantan los plátanos amarillos!

EN_1: Orange! The color and the fruit!
EN_2: Peel the orange and eat it!
EN_3: Penny's beak is orange — like an orange!
ES_3: ¡El pico de Penny es anaranjado — ¡como una naranja!

EN_2: Grapes are green or purple!
EN_3: Penny eats green grapes!

EN_2: The pear is green and yellow!
EN_3: Penny has a pear for breakfast!
ES_3: ¡Penny tiene una pera para el desayuno!

EN_2: Strawberries are red!
EN_3: Penny loves red strawberries!
ES_3: ¡A Penny le encantan las fresas rojas!

EN_2: Mango is yellow and orange inside!
ES_2: ¡El mango es amarillo y anaranjado por dentro!
EN_3: Penny eats mango in the summer!

EN_1: Watermelon! Green outside and red inside!
ES_1: ¡Sandía! ¡Verde por fuera y roja por dentro!
EN_2: Watermelon is red and sweet!
EN_3: Penny loves cold watermelon!
ES_3: ¡A Penny le encanta la sandía fría!

EN_2: Pineapple is yellow and sweet!
EN_3: Penny eats pineapple on the beach!

EN_2: Water is good for you!
EN_3: Penny drinks cold water every day!
ES_3: ¡Penny bebe agua fría todos los días!

EN_2: Orange juice comes from oranges!
ES_2: ¡El jugo de naranja viene de las naranjas!
EN_3: Penny drinks orange juice every morning!
ES_3: ¡Penny toma jugo de naranja cada mañana!

EN_1: Yogurt! White and good for you!
EN_2: Yogurt is sweet and cold!
EN_3: Penny's favorite yogurt is vanilla!
ES_3: ¡El yogur favorito de Penny es de vainilla!

EN_2: Eat bread for breakfast!
EN_3: Penny puts butter on her bread!
ES_3: ¡Penny le pone mantequilla a su pan!

EN_2: Eat cereal with milk every morning!
EN_3: Penny's favorite cereal is yellow!
ES_3: ¡El cereal favorito de Penny es amarillo!

EN_1: Coffee! That is for big people!
EN_2: Coffee is hot and brown!
EN_3: Penny does not drink coffee — she is too young!

EN_2: Drink milk — it is good for your bones!
EN_3: Penny drinks two glasses of milk every day!
ES_3: ¡Penny toma dos vasos de leche todos los días!

EN_2: Bees make honey!
EN_3: Penny puts honey on everything!

EN_2: Sugar makes things sweet!
EN_3: Penny puts sugar in her tea!
ES_3: ¡Penny le pone azúcar a su té!

EN_2: Put butter on your toast!
EN_3: Penny eats two pieces of toast!

EN_2: Butter goes on bread and toast!
ES_2: ¡La mantequilla va en el pan y la tostada!
EN_3: Penny loves butter on everything!
ES_3: ¡A Penny le encanta la mantequilla en todo!

EN_1: Jelly! Red or purple or orange!
EN_2: Put jelly on your bread!
EN_3: Penny loves strawberry jelly!
ES_3: ¡A Penny le encanta la mermelada de fresa!

EN_1: Oatmeal! Hot and good for you!
EN_2: Eat oatmeal with honey!
EN_3: Penny eats oatmeal every morning!

EN_2: Avocado is green inside!
EN_3: Penny puts avocado on her toast!

EN_2: Cheese is yellow or white!
EN_3: Penny loves yellow cheese!
ES_3: ¡A Penny le encanta el queso amarillo!

EN_2: A sunny day is hot and bright!
ES_2: ¡Un día soleado es caliente y brillante!
EN_3: Penny loves sunny days at the beach!
ES_3: ¡A Penny le encantan los días soleados en la playa!

EN_2: Clouds are white and gray!
EN_3: Penny loves cloudy and cold days!
ES_3: ¡A Penny le encantan los días nublados y fríos!

EN_2: A storm has rain and thunder!
EN_3: Penny is scared of storms!

EN_2: Hold on — the wind is strong!
EN_3: The wind blows Penny's hat away!
ES_3: ¡El viento se lleva el sombrero de Penny!

EN_2: It is raining — the sky is gray!
EN_3: Penny loves the rain — she is a water bird!
ES_3: ¡A Penny le encanta la lluvia — ¡es un ave acuática!

EN_2: Snow is white and cold!
EN_3: Penny lives in the snow — Antarctica!

EN_2: Dogs are happy and friendly!
EN_3: Penny wants a pet dog!

EN_2: Cats are soft and quiet!
EN_3: Penny and the cat are best friends!
ES_3: ¡Penny y el gato son mejores amigos!

EN_2: Guinea pigs are small and friendly!
EN_3: Penny has a pet guinea pig!

EN_2: Rabbits have long ears!
EN_3: Penny hops like a rabbit!

EN_2: Chickens are yellow and white!
EN_3: Penny is a bird — just like a chicken!
ES_3: ¡Penny es un ave — ¡igual que una gallina!

EN_2: Birds are red and blue and yellow!
ES_2: ¡Los pájaros son rojos y azules y amarillos!
EN_3: Penny is a bird too!

EN_1: Parrot! Green and red and blue!
EN_2: Parrots copy what you say!
EN_3: Penny and the parrot both have beaks!

EN_1: Fish! Blue and red and orange!
EN_2: Fish live in the water!
EN_3: Fish is Penny's favorite food!
ES_3: ¡El pescado es la comida favorita de Penny!

EN_2: Turtles are slow but happy!
EN_3: Penny swims faster than a turtle!
ES_3: ¡Penny nada más rápido que una tortuga!

EN_2: Tigers are orange and black and white!
ES_2: ¡Los tigres son anaranjados y negros y blancos!
EN_3: Penny is scared of the tiger!

EN_2: Lions are big and strong!
EN_3: Penny and the lion are not friends!
ES_3: ¡Penny y el león no son amigos!

EN_2: Monkeys love to climb and jump!
ES_2: ¡A los monos les encanta trepar y saltar!
EN_3: Penny and the monkey are best friends!
ES_3: ¡Penny y el mono son mejores amigos!

EN_2: Dolphins swim fast and jump high!
ES_2: ¡Los delfines nadan rápido y saltan alto!
EN_3: Penny and the dolphin race in the water!
ES_3: ¡Penny y el delfín compiten en el agua!

EN_2: Crocodiles have big teeth — careful!
EN_3: Penny runs away from the crocodile!

EN_2: Elephants are big and gray!
EN_3: Penny sits on the elephant!

EN_2: Zebras are black and white — like Penny!
ES_2: ¡Las cebras son negras y blancas — ¡como Penny!
EN_3: Penny and the zebra are the same colors!
ES_3: ¡Penny y la cebra son del mismo color!

EN_2: Bears are big and strong!
EN_3: Penny is scared of the big bear!

EN_1: Giraffe! Tall with a long neck!
EN_2: Giraffes are yellow and brown!
EN_3: Penny wants to be tall like the giraffe!
ES_3: ¡Penny quiere ser alta como la jirafa!

EN_2: Penguins are black and white!
EN_3: Penny is a penguin — hello!

EN_2: Polar bears are white and live in the snow!
ES_2: ¡Los osos polares son blancos y viven en la nieve!
EN_3: Penny and the polar bear are cold neighbors!
ES_3: ¡Penny y el oso polar son vecinos en el frío!

EN_2: Hippos are big and gray and live in water!
ES_2: ¡Los hipopótamos son grandes y grises y viven en el agua!
EN_3: Penny swims with the hippo!

EN_2: Snakes are long and have no legs!
ES_2: ¡Las serpientes son largas y no tienen patas!
EN_3: Penny is scared of snakes!

EN_2: Kangaroos are brown and jump very high!
ES_2: ¡Los canguros son marrones y saltan muy alto!
EN_3: Penny jumps like a kangaroo!

EN_2: Sharks are gray and live in the ocean!
ES_2: ¡Los tiburones son grises y viven en el océano!
EN_3: Penny swims away from the shark — fast!

EN_2: Pigs are pink and say oink!
ES_2: ¡Los cerdos son rosados y dicen oink!
EN_3: Penny is not a pig — she is a penguin!
ES_3: ¡Penny no es un cerdo — ¡es una pingüina!

EN_2: Sheep are white and say baa!
ES_2: ¡Las ovejas son blancas y dicen bee!
EN_3: Penny is white — just like a sheep!

EN_1: Cow! Black and white and big!
EN_2: Cows give us milk!
EN_3: Penny drinks the cow's milk!
ES_3: ¡Penny toma la leche de la vaca!

EN_2: Ducks are yellow and they swim!
EN_3: Penny swims faster than the duck!
ES_3: ¡Penny nada más rápido que el pato!

EN_2: The hen is a girl chicken!
EN_3: Penny and the hen are both birds!
ES_3: ¡Penny y la gallina son las dos aves!

EN_2: Horses are brown and run fast!
ES_2: ¡Los caballos son marrones y corren rápido!
EN_3: Penny rides the horse!

EN_2: Goats are white and climb rocks!
ES_2: ¡Las cabras son blancas y escalan rocas!
EN_3: Penny and the goat are friends!

EN_2: The rooster wakes up early!
EN_3: The rooster wakes up Penny every morning!
ES_3: ¡El gallo despierta a Penny cada mañana!

EN_2: Use a ruler to draw a straight line!
ES_2: ¡Usa una regla para trazar una línea recta!
EN_3: Penny uses a ruler in school!
ES_3: ¡Penny usa una regla en la escuela!

EN_2: Books have words and pictures!
EN_3: Penny reads a book every night!

EN_2: Write your words in the notebook!
EN_3: Penny has a pink notebook!

EN_2: A pen writes in blue or black!
ES_2: ¡Un bolígrafo escribe en azul o negro!
EN_3: Penny uses a blue pen to write!
ES_3: ¡Penny usa un bolígrafo azul para escribir!

EN_2: A pencil is yellow!
EN_3: Penny writes with a yellow pencil!

EN_2: Crayons come in every color!
ES_2: ¡Los crayones vienen en todos los colores!
EN_3: Penny draws with a pink crayon!

EN_2: Use the eraser to fix your mistake!
ES_2: ¡Usa el borrador para corregir tu error!
EN_3: Penny erases with a big eraser!

EN_2: Put your book on the desk!
EN_3: Penny's desk is clean and organized!
ES_3: ¡El escritorio de Penny está limpio y organizado!

EN_2: Sit in your chair and learn!
EN_3: Penny sits in a blue chair!
ES_3: ¡Penny se sienta en una silla azul!

EN_2: Put your books in your backpack!
EN_3: Penny has a pink backpack!

EN_2: Glue sticks things together!
EN_3: Penny uses glue to make art!

EN_2: A triangle has three sides and three corners!
ES_2: ¡Un triángulo tiene tres lados y tres esquinas!
EN_3: Penny draws a triangle!

EN_2: A circle is round — no corners!
EN_3: Penny draws circles all day!

EN_2: A square has four sides — all the same!
EN_3: Penny's house is a square!
ES_3: ¡La casa de Penny es un cuadrado!

EN_2: A rectangle has two long and two short sides!
ES_2: ¡Un rectángulo tiene dos lados largos y dos cortos!
EN_3: Penny's door is a rectangle!
ES_3: ¡La puerta de Penny es un rectángulo!

EN_2: Stars have five points!
EN_3: Penny is a star!

EN_1: Diamond! Like a square on its side!
EN_2: A diamond has four sides!
EN_3: Penny loves diamonds!

EN_2: A pentagon has five sides!
EN_3: Penny draws a pentagon!

EN_2: An oval is round but not a circle!
ES_2: ¡Un óvalo es redondo pero no es un círculo!
EN_3: Penny's egg is oval!
ES_3: ¡El huevo de Penny es un óvalo!

EN_2: A heart is pink and red!
EN_3: Penny draws a heart for you!

EN_2: A hexagon has six sides!
EN_3: Bees make hexagons in their home!
ES_3: ¡Las abejas hacen hexágonos en su casa!

EN_2: A stop sign is an octagon — eight sides!
ES_2: ¡Una señal de alto es un octágono — ¡ocho lados!
EN_3: Penny counts eight sides — octagon!

EN_2: A cross has four arms!
EN_3: Penny draws a cross!

EN_2: Rice is white and good for you!
ES_2: ¡El arroz es blanco y bueno para ti!
EN_3: Penny eats rice every day!

EN_1: Potatoes! Brown outside and white inside!
ES_1: ¡Papas! ¡Marrones por fuera y blancas por dentro!
EN_2: Potatoes can be hot or cold!
ES_2: ¡Las papas pueden ser calientes o frías!
EN_3: Penny loves potatoes with butter!
ES_3: ¡A Penny le encantan las papas con mantequilla!

EN_2: Beef is red meat from a cow!
ES_2: ¡La carne de res es carne roja de una vaca!
EN_3: Penny loves beef for dinner!
ES_3: ¡A Penny le encanta la carne de res para cenar!

EN_2: Eat soup when you are sick!
EN_3: Penny makes fish soup!

EN_2: Pasta is long and white!
EN_3: Pasta is Penny's favorite food!
ES_3: ¡La pasta es la comida favorita de Penny!

EN_2: A salad has green and red vegetables!
ES_2: ¡Una ensalada tiene verduras verdes y rojas!
EN_3: Penny eats a big green salad!

EN_2: Sweet potatoes are orange inside!
EN_3: Penny loves sweet potatoes!

EN_2: Tea is brown and hot!
EN_3: Penny drinks hot tea every morning!

EN_2: Lemonade is cold and yellow!
EN_3: Penny drinks lemonade in the summer!

EN_2: A steak is a big piece of beef!
ES_2: ¡Un bistec es un gran trozo de carne de res!
EN_3: Penny eats a big steak for dinner!
ES_3: ¡Penny come un gran bistec para cenar!

EN_2: Lasagna has pasta and cheese and sauce!
ES_2: ¡La lasaña tiene pasta y queso y salsa!
EN_3: Penny loves lasagna!

EN_2: Lentils are small and brown!
EN_3: Penny eats lentil soup!

EN_2: A turkey is a big brown bird!
ES_2: ¡Un pavo es un ave grande y marrón!
EN_3: Penny eats turkey on big holidays!
ES_3: ¡Penny come pavo en las grandes fiestas!

EN_2: Hot cocoa is brown and sweet!
ES_2: ¡El cacao caliente es marrón y dulce!
EN_3: Penny drinks cocoa when it is cold!

EN_1: Wine! That is for big people!
EN_2: Wine is red or white — only for adults!
ES_2: ¡El vino es rojo o blanco — solo para adultos!
EN_3: Penny does not drink wine!

EN_1: Beans! Black or red or white!
EN_2: Beans are small and good for you!
ES_2: ¡Los frijoles son pequeños y buenos para ti!
EN_3: Penny loves black beans!
ES_3: ¡A Penny le encantan los frijoles negros!

EN_1: Tuna! Gray and from the ocean!
EN_2: Tuna is a big gray fish!
ES_2: ¡El atún es un pez gris grande!
EN_3: Tuna is Penny's second favorite fish!
ES_3: ¡El atún es el segundo pez favorito de Penny!

EN_1: Broccoli! Green like a little tree!
EN_2: Broccoli is green and good for you!
ES_2: ¡El brócoli es verde y bueno para ti!
EN_3: Penny eats broccoli every day!

EN_2: Onions make you cry when you cut them!
ES_2: ¡Las cebollas te hacen llorar cuando las cortas!
EN_3: Penny cries when she cuts onions!

EN_2: Carrots are orange and good for your eyes!
ES_2: ¡Las zanahorias son anaranjadas y buenas para los ojos!
EN_3: Penny eats carrots every day!

EN_2: Tomatoes are red and round!
EN_3: Penny loves red tomatoes!
ES_3: ¡A Penny le encantan los tomates rojos!

EN_2: Corn is yellow and grows tall!
ES_2: ¡El maíz es amarillo y crece alto!
EN_3: Penny loves yellow corn!
ES_3: ¡A Penny le encanta el maíz amarillo!

EN_2: Cucumbers are long and green!
EN_3: Penny eats cold cucumbers!

EN_2: Lettuce is green and goes in salads!
ES_2: ¡La lechuga es verde y va en las ensaladas!
EN_3: Penny puts lettuce on everything!

EN_1: Peppers! Red or green or yellow!
EN_2: Peppers come in red and green and yellow!
ES_2: ¡Los pimientos vienen en rojo y verde y amarillo!
EN_3: Penny's favorite pepper is red!
ES_3: ¡El pimiento favorito de Penny es rojo!

EN_2: Garlic is white and very strong!
ES_2: ¡El ajo es blanco y muy fuerte!
EN_3: Penny puts garlic in all her food!
ES_3: ¡Penny le pone ajo a toda su comida!

EN_2: Spinach is dark green and good for you!
ES_2: ¡La espinaca es verde oscura y buena para ti!
EN_3: Penny eats spinach to swim fast!

EN_2: Cabbage is round and light green!
ES_2: ¡El repollo es redondo y verde claro!
EN_3: Penny puts cabbage in her soup!

EN_2: Beets are purple and round!
EN_3: Penny loves purple beets!
ES_3: ¡A Penny le encanta la remolacha morada!

EN_2: Peas are small and green and round!
ES_2: ¡Los guisantes son pequeños y verdes y redondos!
EN_3: Penny eats peas with every meal!

EN_2: Green beans are long and thin!
EN_3: Penny eats green beans for dinner!
